creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #3)
fcitx-qt5 is not "fcitx implemented in qt5", but "fcitx support module for qt5", i.e., it's for being used with applications written in qt5. The fcitx-qt6 port provides the required module for being used by applications written in qt6. We should keep fcitx-qt5 when we still have ports using qt5.
